title: CUB Digital Reimagined
subtitle: Elevating Indian mobile banking with zero-to-one innovation.
problem_statement: CUB's current app offers basic banking, lacking proactive financial guidance and personalized engagement for modern Indian users.

pillars.title: Financial Security
pillars.insight: Users need assurance their money is safe and transactions are secure.

pillars.title: Ease of Access
pillars.insight: Quick access to funds, transfers, and account details is crucial.

pillars.title: Future Growth
pillars.insight: Users seek tools to grow wealth and manage finances effectively.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we personalize CUB's banking experience?
How might users achieve financial wellness proactively?
How might we integrate lifestyle services seamlessly?

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need smart tools to manage my daily spending.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy professional seeking efficient, intelligent financial management beyond basic transactions.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: I want to save for future goals easily.
personas.bio: Aspiring saver, needs intuitive tools for goal-based savings and expense tracking.

insights: "My bank app is just for transactions."
"I wish I knew where my money goes."
"Am I saving enough for my goals?"

points.action: Replace generic account view with personalized financial dashboard.
Integrate budgeting tools with transaction history for insights.
Adapt gamification principles for saving and investment goals.
Modify fund transfer to include contextual payment options.

pivot.before: Static account view and manual financial tracking.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from reactive transaction display to proactive, intelligent financial guidance and goal achievement.
pivot.after: Dynamic, personalized financial dashboard with AI-driven insights and goal tracking.

stages.actions: Taps contact, enters amount, taps pay.

stages.friction: No goal-setting or advice in CUB app.
Banner is promotional, not integrated feature.

annotations.title: Smart Budget
annotations.rationale: Auto-categorizes spending, provides real-time budget alerts.

annotations.title: Goal Tracker
annotations.rationale: Visualizes savings progress for user-defined financial goals.

annotations.title: Proactive Alerts
annotations.rationale: Notifies users about unusual spending or upcoming bills.

data.finding: "Daily Expense" is account name, not a feature.
No clear undo for transfers before confirmation.
Quick access icons are useful for frequent tasks.
